text:
Created attachment 223929
changed maintainer

I'm a user of cwm in FreeBSD 13.0 RC5, when i installed cwm i received the message there is no maintainer for this package. however, in the mirror the MAINTAINER is me@emilengler.com? The port is not up to date and the last update was May 2020.

So I'm not sure if the port needs a new maintainer or if the maintainer is still active, if it is needed then i volunteer to maintain this port.
